---
title: "Random Notes"
author: "Andrew Seaman"
---

# Date: 1-21-26

Let's import the libraries and data set.
```{r setup1, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(pander)

df <- read_csv("Data/Olympics.csv")
```

Let's get a count of years.
```{r}
df %>% 
  group_by(Year) %>% 
  summarize(count = n())
```


```{r}
df %>% 
  group_by(Year) %>% 
  summarize(count = formatC(n(), format = "d", big.mark = ","))
```
